title: Quality Florist/Craft Baby Pink Wired Edge Chiffon Organza Ribbon (70mm wide x 20m)
features: Great for wrapping gifts to give them that special touch
description: Product Description This ribbon could give any gift a fabulously delicate touch. Or you may want to garland it to add to your decorations. Whatever your wants or needs whether it be a birthday, christening or baby shower, this beautiful ribbon is perfect . Box Contains ribbons
